arts.ttl: ‘A great night’ - Kounde celebrates 100th Barca outing in style
arts.sum: Kounde also spoke to the club’s media and admitted it had been a good night and a great win for the team. Barcelona ran out 5-1 winners in the game at Montjuic, with Kounde handed a special shirt after the match as he celebrated his landmark with his team-mates.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich star Jamal Musiala says “Things can always change quickly in the world of football”
arts.sum: Musiala recently touched on the topic with Welt Am Sonntag (as captured by Goal ). However, recent reports indicate that Musiala is not talking to any clubs aside of the Bavarians at the moment.

arts.ttl: Training Report: Bayern Munich’s Jamal Musiala takes part in team session; Josip Stanišić does running workout; and MORE!
arts.sum: As many expected, Jamal Musiala was in team training and preparing to face FC Barcelona : Versatile Bayern Munich defender Josip Stanišić is finally back on the pitch as he took part in a running workout on Monday.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Max Eberl, Vincent Kompany react to Thomas Tuchel getting the England job
arts.sum: Tuchel’s tenure at Bayern did not quite work out as it was expected when he was hired to replace Julian Nagelsmann, despite him winning a Meisterschale and very nearly getting to a Champions League final. Former Bayern Munich, Chelsea, Paris Saint-Germain, Dortmund and Mainz manager has been hired eventually replace interim Three Lions manager Lee Carsley, who has been overseeing the national team since Gareth Southgate made the decision to step down after the European Championships this summer.

arts.ttl: Dominic Solanke reveals Harry Kane conversations
arts.sum: Kane was ruled out of England's disappointing 2-1 defeat to Greece in the UEFA Nations League after picking up an injury, whilst Solanke arrived into the game in the 72nd minute to make his first international appearance since 2017. I didn't get the goal, which is obviously frustrating for me personally, but it was a great game and if we keep playing like this we'll be in a good place."

arts.ttl: Did Bayern Munich Get It Wrong With Its Logo Update?
arts.sum: Following Bayern München’s recent announcement of a logo color update to comply with Germany’s Accessibility Improvement Act (Barrierefreiheitsstärkungsgesetz), Footy Headlines' research suggests that the change might not have been necessary after all.

arts.ttl: Pena hails ‘spectacular’ Szczęsny as he talks battle to be Barca’s No. 1
arts.sum: We know that he is a goalkeeper with a lot of experience, who has played in many teams in Europe at Champions level and he will help us. Szczęsny will now battle Pena for the No. 1 spot and the 25-year-old says he’s happy to have the former Juventus stopper in the squad.

arts.ttl: Bayern and Marseille want Rashford - Tuesday's gossip
arts.sum: Bayern Munich and Marseille are interested in Marcus Rashford, Manchester United are willing to listen to loan offers for Antony, plus more.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star joins Cole Palmer & Mo Salah in exclusive 3-man club
arts.sum: Barcelona star Raphinha on Sunday secured for himself a place in an altogether high-profile club. As much came by way of his exploits in Barcelona’s La Liga meeting with Sevilla.…

arts.ttl: A surprise Barcelona star led both teams in dribbles in Sevilla clash
arts.sum: A surprise member of the defensive ranks at Barcelona managed to complete more dribbles than any other player on the pitch in the club’s most recent outing. The player in…
